title: MikroTik FTC21, Fiber to Copper Converter
description: FTC21 is an optical-metallic converter equipped with a switch chip, SwOS Lite management (supporting VLAN, LAG, IGMP, SNMP, ACL, traffic shaping, etc.), in an outdoor enclosure with IP55 protection . This converter features 2x Gigabit LAN ports, with the first port supporting PoE-IN, and one SFP slot supporting up to 2.5 Gbps for optical modules. The converter supports multiple power supply methods, including active PoE standards (802.3af/at), passive PoE (24â57V), and DC connector power with…
